high_level_description: A wide cinematic 1216 x 832 anime illustration in the style of Akira Toriyama and Dr. Slump. A chibi mechanic in an orange jumpsuit sits at a workbench with a large control panel covered in screens, dials, and status lights. He is running smoke tests on the LLM hub, with four model cards displayed on a big screen showing different results: one green checkmark, one yellow warning, two with yellow caution signs. The mechanic has a clipboard and looks like a scientist running experiments. Everything is ultimately green and working. Cel-shaded, vibrant, playful, safe for a technology blog illustration.

style_description.aesthetics: Akira Toriyama anime style, Dr. Slump chibi style, Dragon Ball cel-shaded cartoon, bold black outlines, rounded exaggerated proportions, expressive faces, focused scientist at work scene, clean technology blog illustration, no photorealism, no 3D render
style_description.lighting: Bright workbench lighting with focused desk lamps, green and amber glow from the status lights on the control panel, concentrated and methodical mood with clean light
style_description.art_style: digital anime illustration, vector-like clean coloring, bold outlines, cel-shaded, flat coloring with subtle gradients, no photorealism, no 3D render

compositional_deconstruction.background: A clean workshop interior with light gray walls, a large workbench in the foreground, tool racks on the back wall. Bright overhead lighting. Some scattered notes and a coffee mug on the bench to suggest a long testing session.

elements.desc: A chibi mechanic sitting at the workbench on a stool, brown spiky hair, round glasses, orange jumpsuit, blue cap with white wrench emblem. He has a focused but satisfied expression, holding a clipboard with a checklist in one hand and a small screwdriver in the other. He looks like a quality inspector who just finished a long shift and is mostly happy with the results.

A large control panel screen on the workbench showing four model test cards in a 2x2 grid. Each card has a model name and a status indicator: one card shows a green checkmark, one shows a yellow warning triangle, and two show yellow caution symbols with small notes. The screen has a dark background with cyan borders. The cards are colorful and clearly organized like a dashboard.
Small status lights and dials along the bottom of the control panel, mostly glowing green with two amber lights. A small oscilloscope-like waveform display showing API response curves.
A clipboard with a checklist on the mechanic's lap, with several items checked off with green checkmarks and a few with yellow highlights. A pen is clipped to it.
Small floating checkmark and warning icons around the screen, green checkmarks and yellow triangles, suggesting the mixed but overall successful test results.
The exact text SMOKE TEST in bold green comic-style letters at the top of the big screen. Perfectly readable, horizontal, front-facing.
The exact text PASS in large green letters on the screen near the green checkmark card. Perfectly readable, horizontal, front-facing.
